anime.title: EPISODES

anime.raw_text: Classic Doraemon consists of a total of 77 episodes, originally from the early 1979 anime. It includes 71 episodes from April to June 1979 (1 to 78), all except 7 of them (10, 11, 22, 24, 42, 52, 72); and 6 more episodes from later in 1979, and in 1980 (82, 83, 106, 107, 295, 305).
